UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the BISTrack application, linking to their portfolio(s) and managing user-specific data.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

username.description: The user's chosen display name within the application.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Portfolio.title: Portfolio
Portfolio.description: Represents a collection of stock holdings managed by a user, providing an overview of their investments.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Portfolio entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile this portfolio belongs to. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Portfolio)

name.description: A user-defined name for the portfolio (e.g., 'Ana Portföy', 'Uzun Vadeli Yatırımlar').

description.description: An optional detailed description for the portfolio.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the portfolio was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated.

StockHolding.title: StockHolding
StockHolding.description: Represents a specific stock and its details held within a user's portfolio, including quantity and average purchase cost.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StockHolding entity.

portfolioId.description: Reference to the Portfolio this stock holding belongs to. (Relationship: Portfolio 1:N StockHolding)

symbol.description: The Borsa İstanbul (BIST) stock symbol (e.g., THYAO, EREGL, SASA).

quantity.description: The total number of shares held for this specific stock.

averageCost.description: The weighted average cost per share for this stock holding.

currency.description: The currency of the stock holding (e.g., 'TRY'). For BIST stocks, this will typically be 'TRY'.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this stock holding was first added or a transaction impacting it occurred.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this stock holding was last updated (e.g., due to a new buy/sell transaction changing quantity or average cost).

DividendRecord.title: DividendRecord
DividendRecord.description: User-specific dividend data for a stock.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores portfolios created by a specific user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: portfolioId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific portfolio.

definition.description: Stores individual stock holdings within a specific portfolio.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: portfolioId
params.description: The unique identifier of the parent portfolio.

params.name: stockHoldingId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific stock holding.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore structure supports hierarchical data for portfolios and user-specific customizations like dividend tracking, ensuring security via Authorization Independence.
